name: engineering-discipline
description: Codex-native engineering discipline skills and advisory hooks for risk routing, PRDs, verified implementation, regression review, living docs, architecture, task planning, Laravel, and Filament conventions.

interface.shortDescription: Risk routing, PRDs, verified implementation, architecture, and living docs for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native adaptation of disciplined engineering workflows for PRDs, implementation, regression review, architecture evolution, Scribe docs, Laravel, and Filament. Default hooks are advisory-only; enforcing hooks are optional.
